! Ethereum Phishing Detection

This is an official MetaMask security notification.

Dear MetaMask user, our system has detected suspicious activity indicating an attempted unauthorized access to your credentials. We strongly recommend that you immediately change your wallet password.

If you have other cryptocurrency or DeFi wallets, please update their passwords as well.

MetaMask will never ask you to reveal your secret recovery phrase or private keys. If any site or message requests this information, it is likely a scam.

To reset and restore your MetaMask wallet, please follow our official instructions:

https://support.metamask.io/managing-my-wallet/resetting-deleting-and-restoring/how-can-i-reset-my-password/

If you have any questions, please contact the official MetaMask support team.

For more security tips, visit: https://metamask.io/security

Keep your MetaMask and browser up to date to ensure maximum protection.

Official support center: https://support.metamask.io
